TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Meniq ka pncbuwan Tanah Tunux daka rudan ta mneniq Paran hii cbeyo we, "Musya ziken(Kari Tanah Tunux:ťúßÁ§ĺšļčšĽ∂ÔľŹ„āÄ„Āó„āÉ„Āė„ĀĎ„āď)" mesa ka Tanah Tunux ma, "Mkuni Paran / Kncyukan Tanah Tunux Paran" mesa ka rudan ta ita Kari Seediq (Tgdaya). Qlhangan Tanah Tunux ka Taywang nii ciida we, ini na psngai pqeepah ddaun quri ndheya ka Seediq alang ta, so ka smeelu, smmalu hako; mpheyu sapah ptasan ma sapah pyasan de, saanun na paapa qhuni dgiyaq Ucuucik dungan. Irih so meyah psqrinuc ita ka Tanah Tunux, asi lux mgedang qqpahan daha ka rudan ta. Inu dungan, ye tena mhedu mpprengo ka seediq mdudul alang ma, wada daha spooda Gaya ta kmciyuk ka Tanah Tunux di, ani ba knkana pnrrungan daha mesa kari rudan mntngari dehuk alang Gluban hii. Bale ba we, mmteru alang ka knciyuk Tanah Tunux ciida, maha 1300 hei kana seediq na hayan, bobo pnuurung de ini dehuk 300 hei ka mntngari na di.
S.PHON: m…ôniq ka pn ¶buwan tanańß tunux daka …ĺudan ta mn…ôniq pa…ĺan ńßii ¶b…ôo w…ô, "musja *ik…ôn(ka…ĺi tanańß tunux:***********)" m…ôsa ka tanańß tunux ma, "mkuni pa…ĺan / kn ¶jukan tanańß tunux pa…ĺan" m…ôsa ka …ĺudan ta ita ka…ĺi s…ô…ôdiq (tgdaja). qlńßaŇčan tanańß tunux ka tajwaŇč nii ¶iida w…ô, ini na psŇčai pq…ô…ôpańß ddaun qu…ĺi ndńß…ôa ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč ta, so ka sm…ô…ôlu, smmalu ńßako; mpńß…ôu sapańß ptasan ma sapańß pjasan d…ô, saanun na paapa qńßuni dgijaq u ¶uu ¶ik duŇčan. i…ĺińß so m…ôańß psq…ĺinu ¶ ita ka tanańß tunux, asi lux mg…ôdaŇč qqpańßan dańßa ka …ĺudan ta. inu duŇčan, j…ô t…ôna mńß…ôdu mpp…ĺ…ôŇčo ka s…ô…ôdiq mdudul alaŇč ma, wada dańßa spooda gaja ta km ¶ijuk ka tanańß tunux di, ani ba knkana pn…ĺ…ĺuŇčan dańßa m…ôsa ka…ĺi …ĺudan mntŇča…ĺi d…ôńßuk alaŇč gluban ńßii. bal…ô ba w…ô, mmt…ô…ĺu alaŇč ka kn ¶ijuk tanańß tunux ¶iida, mańßa **** ńß…ôi kana s…ô…ôdiq na ńßajan, bobo pnuu…ĺuŇč d…ô ini d…ôńßuk *** ńß…ôi ka mntŇča…ĺi na di.
S.FORM: Meniq ka pncbuwan Tanah Tunux daka rudan ta mneniq Paran hii cbeyo we, "Musya ziken(Kari Tanah Tunux:ťúßÁ§ĺšļčšĽ∂ÔľŹ„āÄ„Āó„āÉ„Āė„ĀĎ„āď)" mesa ka Tanah Tunux ma, "Mkuni Paran / Kncyukan Tanah Tunux Paran" mesa ka rudan ta ita Kari Seediq (Tgdaya). Qlhangan Tanah Tunux ka Taywang nii ciida we, ini na psngai pqeepah ddaun quri ndheya ka Seediq alang ta, so ka smeelu, smmalu hako; mpheyu sapah ptasan ma sapah pyasan de, saanun na paapa qhuni dgiyaq Ucuucik dungan. Irih so meyah psqrinuc ita ka Tanah Tunux, asi lux mgedang qqpahan daha ka rudan ta. Inu dungan, ye tena mhedu mpprengo ka seediq mdudul alang ma, wada daha spooda Gaya ta kmciyuk ka Tanah Tunux di, ani ba knkana pnrrungan daha mesa kari rudan mntngari dehuk alang Gluban hii. Bale ba we, mmteru alang ka knciyuk Tanah Tunux ciida, maha 1300 hei kana seediq na hayan, bobo pnuurung de ini dehuk 300 hei ka mntngari na di.
S.PHON: m…ôniq ka pn ¶buwan tanańß tunux daka …ĺudan ta mn…ôniq pa…ĺan ńßii ¶b…ôo w…ô, "musja *ik…ôn(ka…ĺi tanańß tunux:***********)" m…ôsa ka tanańß tunux ma, "mkuni pa…ĺan / kn ¶jukan tanańß tunux pa…ĺan" m…ôsa ka …ĺudan ta ita ka…ĺi s…ô…ôdiq (tgdaja). qlńßaŇčan tanańß tunux ka tajwaŇč nii ¶iida w…ô, ini na psŇčai pq…ô…ôpańß ddaun qu…ĺi ndńß…ôa ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč ta, so ka sm…ô…ôlu, smmalu ńßako; mpńß…ôu sapańß ptasan ma sapańß pjasan d…ô, saanun na paapa qńßuni dgijaq u ¶uu ¶ik duŇčan. i…ĺińß so m…ôańß psq…ĺinu ¶ ita ka tanańß tunux, asi lux mg…ôdaŇč qqpańßan dańßa ka …ĺudan ta. inu duŇčan, j…ô t…ôna mńß…ôdu mpp…ĺ…ôŇčo ka s…ô…ôdiq mdudul alaŇč ma, wada dańßa spooda gaja ta km ¶ijuk ka tanańß tunux di, ani ba knkana pn…ĺ…ĺuŇčan dańßa m…ôsa ka…ĺi …ĺudan mntŇča…ĺi d…ôńßuk alaŇč gluban ńßii. bal…ô ba w…ô, mmt…ô…ĺu alaŇč ka kn ¶ijuk tanańß tunux ¶iida, mańßa **** ńß…ôi kana s…ô…ôdiq na ńßajan, bobo pnuu…ĺuŇč d…ô ini d…ôńßuk *** ńß…ôi ka mntŇča…ĺi na di.
